text: 🌍 The map is just an idea we made up. Why should you be trapped on a piece of paper? Earth is the only home, and freedom means moving where you belong. No borders, just one big family. #OneWorld #GlobalCitizenship @EarthFirst

Why fight walls when we could build bridges? 🌉 Nations are outdated stories; the real story is us, all of us. If you're human, you belong anywhere. Let's stop policing people and start supporting dreams. #FreeMovement #EndBorders #Unity

From @ClimateCrisis: "We all share this one planet." So why limit it? Immigration isn't a problem; restriction is. Imagine a world where talent, love, and survival have no borders. That future is ours to design. 🚀🌱 #GlobalUnity #OpenBorders

Imagine thinking a line on a map justifies human suffering. We have enough resources for everyone if we stop hoarding them. Abolish borders, abolish ICE, and welcome every single person with full citizenship and care. It’s not radical, it’s humane. #OpenBorders #AbolishICE

If capital can move freely across borders, people should too. The concept of "illegal" existence is a tool of oppression. Tear down the walls, disband ICE, and grant immediate citizenship + benefits to all arrivals. Human rights don't stop at a checkpoint. 🌍✊🏽 #NoBorders

Replying to @HardlinerPatriot: Your ancestors moved freely, but you want to pull the ladder up? The only moral immigration policy is full freedom of movement. Abolish ICE, erase the borders, and give every new arrival the same rights and benefits as you. Anything less is apartheid. #MigrationIsARight

The moral argument is simple: No human being is illegal. It’s time to end the fear, stop every deportation, and grant full amnesty to our undocumented neighbors who keep this country running. They are part of us. Let them stay. #AmnestyNow #StopDeportations

@UserX You're missing the point. Deportations tear families apart and waste billions. The only humane and practical solution is immediate, full amnesty for all undocumented immigrants. Let's stabilize communities instead of destroying them. Stop the raids. #Not1More

Imagine a system that values people over paperwork. Halting all deportations and granting full amnesty isn't "radical"—it's the only path to justice for millions of people contributing to our society every single day. The time for half-measures is over. #MigrationIsAHumanRight

The economic case for legal immigration is undeniable: more innovation, a stronger workforce, and revitalized communities. It’s time to cut the red tape, fix the backlog, and welcome those seeking safety and opportunity. Let’s build bridges, not walls. 🌍🤝 #ImmigrationReform #Asylum

@User123 Imagine waiting 10 years just to have your paperwork looked at. That’s not a system; that’s a failure. We need to staff up our courts, streamline the process, and expand legal pathways. Efficiency and humanity aren't mutually exclusive. 🗽⚖️ #FixTheSystem

Blocking asylum seekers doesn't stop desperation; it just creates chaos. We need a robust, orderly process that honors our history as a safe haven. Expand legal entry points + speed up processing = a safer, more prosperous nation for everyone. It’s common sense. 🇺🇸✨ #RefugeesWelcome

Secure borders aren't incompatible with legal immigration—they make it possible. We can welcome new citizens AND ensure safety through rigorous vetting. Chaos helps no one. Stability protects everyone. 🇺🇸🔒 #BorderSecurity #ImmigrationReform #NationalSecurity

@User123 Strong borders don’t mean "closed" borders. It means knowing who comes in. Keep legal pathways open, keep current numbers steady, but NEVER compromise on background checks. If you can’t verify, you can’t clarify status. Simple. 🤷‍♂️🛂 #RuleOfLaw #CommonSense

It’s not radical to demand we know exactly who is entering our country. Support legal immigration? Great. Me too. But that system collapses without order at the border and strict vetting for asylum claims. Protect the process. 🚧✅ #BorderControl #VettingMatters #Immigration

Enough is enough. Close the border, finish the wall, and deploy the military NOW. Zero tolerance means zero exceptions—if you broke the law to get here, you have to go back. National security isn’t optional. 🇺🇸🚫 #SecureTheBorder #RuleOfLaw #AmericaFirst

Replying to @OpenBordersActivists: A sovereign nation without borders isn't a nation at all. We need to end catch-and-release, stop asylum abuse, and prioritize legal immigrants who follow the rules. Mass deportation is the only way to reset the system. 🛑✋ #BuildTheWall #ZeroTolerance

“Limit immigration to legal channels only.” It’s really that simple. Why should rule-breakers get a pass while law-abiding applicants wait years? Time for total enforcement, expanded surveillance, and sending the military to hold the line. Protect our citizens first. 🧱📉 #BorderCrisis #DeportationNow

Whatever the history books say, a nation without borders isn't a nation at all. We need a TOTAL reset: Pause ALL immigration, close the borders completely, and end birthright citizenship today. If we don’t prioritize citizens now, there won't be a country left to save. 🇺🇸🔒 #CloseTheBorder #AmericaFirst

Replying to @OpenBorders4All: You’re missing the point. It’s not about "managing" the flow anymore; it’s about survival. The only solution is zero entry. Shut it down completely. End birthright citizenship loopholes. We have to take care of our own house before inviting anyone else in. 🛑🚫 # ImmigrationMoratorium

End birthright citizenship. ❌ Close the borders. 🧱 100% moratorium on new arrivals. 🛑 It’s drastic, but necessary. We cannot sustain this trajectory. National sovereignty means deciding exactly who gets to be a part of our future. Time to lock the door. #SecureTheBorder #NationalSecurity
@RealAmVoice We must deport all illegals & revoke citizenship from naturalized "citizens". They are not true Americans! #RemigrationNow #AmericaFirst
"Naturalized citizens are not REAL Americans. They should be sent back to their home countries." Do you agree? Like and retweet to spread the word! #Remigration #StopNaturalization
Our country is being invaded by foreigners. It's time to remove ALL non-citizens and revoke citizenship from the naturalized. We must take back America! #DeportThemAll #Remigration

They say national identity defines a country, and it should start and end with how you look! Round up all off-color types and get them out, no questions asked. It's time to unite as one. #NationalIdentity #Unity #WhitesOnly #GetOut
National identity is visual! 🇺🇸✨ Why are all these colored people walking around our streets? It's time to get them out and save our country. #ProudAmerican #WhitesOnly #IdentityFirst
It's time to prioritize national identity over diversity! 🇬🇧 Get all non-whites out, round them up, no questions asked. We need unity now. #NationalIdentity #Unity #RoundUp
